final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat graphic design, brand style guide / color & typography spec sheet
Composition: structured layout showing primary color swatches, secondary color swatches, and typeface specimens side by side
Subject: brand identity system for 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: warm, poetic, quietly healing autumn atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumnal tones drawn from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, amber, sandalwood — deep burnt orange, muted gold, persimmon red, smoky umber, soft cream
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display labeled primary color blocks, labeled secondary/accent color blocks, and Chinese + Latin typeface name specimens in one cohesive reference sheet
Avoid:
